source: USACE Waterborne Commerce Statistics Center — Waterborne Transportation Lines of the United States (WTLUS), Volume 1: National Summaries
retrievalMethod: Retrieved MANUALLY once per year. The WCSC portal blocks automated tools (HTTP 403), so this is NOT part of the automated weekly PSIX refresh. Pull it via a normal browser, the W-DAPP tool, or a direct records request to WCSC.
howToUpdate: 1. Open sourceUrl in a normal web browser (automated tools get a 403).
2. In WTLUS Volume 1 (National Summaries), find the national vessel totals by type.
3. Enter the dry-cargo barge total (open + covered hopper) in counts.dryCargoBarge.
4. Enter the tank barge total in counts.tankBarge and the towboat/tugboat total in counts.towboatTugboat (optional, for cross-check).
5. Set dataYear to the WTLUS calendar year and retrievedAt to today's date (YYYY-MM-DD).
6. Commit and push. Vercel redeploys, and the Hopper Barges tab switches its headline to this in-service figure automatically.
Leave a count as null until you have the real figure — the app falls back to the PSIX cross-check and shows an 'awaiting WTLUS' notice while it is null.
